message:
🐛 Add klaude.kubestellar.io redirect and /docs/klaude root redirect

- Add klaude.kubestellar.io → /docs/klaude redirect
- Add /docs/klaude root page redirect to introduction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -192,6 +192,19 @@
   status = 301
   force = true
 
+# Redirect klaude.kubestellar.io to kubestellar.io/docs/klaude
+[[redirects]]
+  from = "https://klaude.kubestellar.io/*"
+  to = "https://kubestellar.io/docs/klaude/:splat"
+  status = 301
+  force = true
+
+[[redirects]]
+  from = "https://klaude.kubestellar.io"
+  to = "https://kubestellar.io/docs/klaude/overview/introduction"
+  status = 301
+  force = true
+
 # Redirect project root pages to first content page
 [[redirects]]
   from = "/docs/a2a"
@@ -223,6 +236,16 @@
   to = "/docs/multi-plugin/overview/introduction"
   status = 302
 
+[[redirects]]
+  from = "/docs/klaude"
+  to = "/docs/klaude/overview/introduction"
+  status = 302
+
+[[redirects]]
+  from = "/docs/klaude/"
+  to = "/docs/multi-plugin/overview/introduction"
+  status = 302
+
 [[redirects]]
   from = "/agenda"
   to = "https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XppfxSOD7AOX1lVVVIPWjpFkrxakfBfVzcybRg17-PM/edit?usp=share_link"
